Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Set For Case Management Conference On Mar-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER to COMPLAINT.

The unopposed motion to strike the answer of defendants Simplified Transport LLC and Simplified Transportations Solutions LLC is granted. Moving party may separately seek entry of their defaults from the clerk.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-12-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT SIMPLIFIED TRANSPORT, LLC'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Defendant Simplified Transport, LLC's unopposed motion to relieve counsel E Sean McLoughlin and Clayton J. Hix and motion for withdrawal of attorney is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling using the mandatory Judicial Counsel Form MC-050.

Visiting Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/DH)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-12-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SIMPLIFIED TRANSPORTATION SOLUTIONS, LLC MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

Defendant Simplified Transportation Solutions, LLC's unopposed motion to relieve counsel E Sean McLoughlin and Clayton J. Hix and motion for withdrawal of attorney is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling using the mandatory Judicial Counsel Form MC-050.

Visiting Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/DH)
